name: emergent
description: Private messenger for developers with workspaces, real-time WebSocket, markdown support, and secure authentication

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend && npm run build -w cli && npm run build -w mobile
scripts.test: npm run test -w backend && npm run test -w frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w backend && npm run lint -w frontend && npm run lint -w cli
scripts.format: npm run format -w backend && npm run format -w frontend && npm run format -w cli
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules dist && npm run clean -w backend && npm run clean -w frontend && npm run clean -w cli && npm run clean -w mobile

author: Emergent Team
